    Class
    Description
    final class 
    ConsoleIkePrompter
    Environment-aware IkePrompter (IKE-Network/ike-issues#385).
    final class 
    ScriptedIkePrompter
    Deterministic IkePrompter that replays a fixed script of answers (IKE-Network/ike-issues#385).

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected IkePrompter
    AbstractGoalMojo.getPrompter()
    The IkePrompter for this goal — built lazily from the session's interactive flag (IKE-Network/ike-issues#385).
